failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'seafood | crab | shrimp | fish | lobster | oyster')
  AND (pr.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant | dining | bistro | cafe | kitchen'))
ORDER BY p.num_comments DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.
